composite_description: No drawdown signal. Conditions do not meet any entry threshold.
brief: RV30 is unchanged at 35% (4.7pp above crisis threshold), while the 1yr-high gap worsened to -47.4% (now 12.4pp deeper into structural risk territory). A signal change requires either a z-score drop below -3.0 in this bear regime, or BTC recovery above the 200d MA to flip to bull phase.
